title: odontites hollianus
intro: Odontites hollianus, also known as Hollian's toothwort, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant, which means it obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to treat various health issues such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Odontites hollianus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and to support the immune system.
